title: Section 31
content: 1[No act of the Council or any Institute[ or Board or Senate or any other body set up under this Act or the Statutes, shall be invalid merely by reason of-- (a) any vacancy in, or defect in, the constitution thereof, or (b) any defect in the election, nomination or appointment of person acting as a member thereof, or (c) any irregularity in its procedure not affecting the merits of the case.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 43 of 2021, s. 30, for "No act of the Institute" (w.e.f. 25-5-2022).
